source.title: PDD Holdings Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 and Fiscal Year 2025 Unaudited Financial Results

extractions.claim: PDD FY2025 revenue grew 10% but operating profit declined 13%, signaling a deliberate margin-for-growth trade
extractions.evidence: FY2025 total revenues RMB 431,845.7M (+10% YoY). Operating profit RMB 94,624.1M (-13% YoY). Net income RMB 99,364.5M (-12% YoY). Non-GAAP operating profit RMB 102,561.0M (-13%). Q4 revenues RMB 123,912.2M (+12%), Q4 operating profit RMB 27,719.7M.

verification.verifier_notes: Directly from Q4/FY2025 earnings press release dated March 25, 2026

extractions.claim: Revenue mix is now roughly 50/50 between online marketing (advertising) and transaction services (commissions/fulfillment), reflecting Temu's growing contribution
extractions.evidence: FY2025: Online marketing services & others RMB 217,783.0M (+10%), Transaction services RMB 214,062.7M (+9%). Q4 2025: Online marketing RMB 60,010.1M (+5%), Transaction services RMB 63,902.1M (+19%).

verification.verifier_notes: Transaction services includes Temu fulfillment fees. The near-equal split and faster Q4 growth in transaction services reflects Temu warehouse model scaling.

extractions.claim: Cost of revenue surged 23% YoY in FY2025 driven by fulfillment fees, bandwidth/server costs, and payment processing — the cost of building Temu's local warehouse network
extractions.evidence: FY2025 total costs of revenues RMB 188,801.8M (+23% vs RMB 153,900.4M in FY2024). Increase mainly from increased fulfillment fees, bandwidth and server costs, and payment processing fees. For context, FY2024 CoR was up 68% YoY, so the rate of increase is decelerating.

verification.verifier_notes: From earnings release. The 23% increase outpaced 10% revenue growth, compressing gross margin.

extractions.claim: R&D spending surged 30% to RMB 16.5B in FY2025, primarily for warehouse automation technology and increased headcount
extractions.evidence: FY2025 R&D expenses RMB 16,496.2M (+30% from RMB 12,659.4M in FY2024), primarily due to increase in staff-related costs and bandwidth and server costs. R&D as % of revenue rose from ~3.2% to ~3.8%.

verification.verifier_notes: R&D figure from earnings release. The 30% increase is confirmed. Warehouse automation attribution comes from analyst reports noting PDD is developing proprietary warehouse automation tech.

extractions.claim: FY2025 stock-based compensation was RMB 7.94B, with G&A (RMB 3.43B) and R&D (RMB 2.26B) as largest components
extractions.evidence: FY2025 SBC breakdown: Cost of revenues RMB 248.2M, Sales & marketing RMB 2,000.8M, G&A RMB 3,430.9M, R&D RMB 2,257.1M. Total RMB 7,937.0M. Q4 2025 SBC: RMB 1,754.4M.

verification.verifier_notes: Directly from earnings release non-GAAP reconciliation tables
